meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Testing Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use testing automation to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. An intermediate guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale.
content.answer_block: To solve the 'no portfolio' trap, build a high-fidelity automated testing suite for a niche SaaS problem. By demonstrating robust QA, CI/CD, and regression testing, you prove technical maturity to clients. Use Antigravity for rapid framework generation and Claude Code to orchestrate complex test suites, turning utility into a marketable asset.
content.intro:
The silence of an empty portfolio is deafening to a founder. You have the vision, but the market demands proof of engineering rigor before they trust you with their data. You aren't just missing projects; you are missing the signal that separates hobbyists from professional software architects.

The bridge between 'just another idea' and a revenue-generating machine is reliability. By leveraging automated testing as your flagship product feature, you transform a liability into a competitive advantage. This guide shows you how to build a production-grade testing architecture that serves as both your portfolio piece and your MVP's backbone.

steps.title: Define the Testable Niche
steps.description: Identify a SaaS vertical—like E-commerce checkout or API integration—where reliability is the primary value proposition. We will build a testing harness that proves your code never breaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Playwright test suite for a mock Stripe-integrated checkout flow. Include modular page objects and data-driven testing patterns for high-concurrency simulation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize Playwright project with TypeScript and modular page object patterns'

steps.title: Implement Visual Regression
steps.description: Visual bugs kill conversions. Build a system that captures snapshots and compares them against a baseline, proving you prioritize UX as much as logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure visual regression testing using Applitools or Playwright snapshotting, focusing on responsive design breakpoints for mobile and desktop.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add visual regression snapshotting to existing test suite'

steps.title: Automate API Contract Testing
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend communicate flawlessly. API contract testing is the gold standard for enterprise-grade SaaS reliability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated suite to validate API schemas using Zod and Pact, ensuring all endpoints return expected data types under load.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement schema validation tests for all existing API routes'

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: A test suite is useless if it's not running automatically. Integrate your tests into a GitHub Actions pipeline that blocks deployments on failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers the test suite on every pull request and sends a status report to a Slack webhook.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with test automation and Slack notifications'

steps.title: Publish the 'Quality Proof' Report
steps.description: Package your results into a public-facing dashboard. Showing prospective clients your 99.9% pass rate is a massive trust-builder.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a simple static dashboard that aggregates JSON test results into a clean, professional status page for client visibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Build a static site generator script to convert test results into a public dashboard'

pro_tips: Always test the 'Happy Path' last; focus your automation on edge cases, as that is where the real value lies for enterprise clients.
Use mock servers (MSW) to isolate your tests from external API rate limits, ensuring your build pipeline remains fast and cost-effective.
Treat your test code with the same refactoring rigor as your production code; technical debt in tests leads to brittle deployments.
Implement flaky test detection early; if a test fails intermittently, kill it or fix it immediately to maintain trust in your automation.
Add 'Performance Budgets' to your tests; have them fail if a page load exceeds 2 seconds, positioning you as an optimization expert.
content.next_steps: Deploy your testing dashboard to Vercel and link it in your LinkedIn 'Featured' section to immediately showcase your architectural discipline to potential clients.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical proof of competence that 90% of developers lack. Stop waiting for the perfect project and start building the foundation of your authority. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
